pre_existing_dirty_files.strategy: additive edits only, expected_before_sha256 on search_replace, never overwrite entire file

completed_phases.name: Database Security Foundation
files_created: docs/json/opencode/database_security_doctrine.v1.json (110 lines, canonical security doctrine for Postgres: OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL convention, Effect Redacted pattern, localhost-only PGlite, CI TLS requirements, role separation)
packages/opencode/src/effect/database-config.ts (Effect Config module with Redacted-backed OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL, SSL flag, pool size)
packages/opencode/src/storage/db.pg.ts (initial stub documenting SSL requirement and Phase 1.3 wiring)

completed_phases.name: Rename SQLite Schema Files
files_renamed: 64 import paths updated across 40 files (27 src/ + 13 test/)
completed_phases.note: Mechanical rename with zero runtime behavior change. All imports verified via grep.

completed_phases.name: Guard SQLite PRAGMAs
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/storage/db.ts: 6 PRAGMAs wrapped in Flag.OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL guard
completed_phases.detail: All 10 unconditional SQLite PRAGMAs are now guarded. When OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL is set, PRAGMAs are skipped. Postgres equivalents documented in comments.

completed_phases.name: Postgres Drivers
files_changed: packages/opencode/src/storage/db.pg.ts: completed init() function supporting both PGlite (file path) and pg (connection string)

completed_phases.name: Postgres Schema Files
files_created: 8 .pg.sql.ts files (1 per schema module + storage helper + data-migration)
drizzle.config.pg.ts (dialect: postgresql, schema glob for .pg.sql.ts files)
12 text({mode:'json'}) → jsonb() conversions across all tables
7 cross-references updated to point to .pg.sql counterparts

completed_phases.name: PostgresAdapter Implementation
files_changed: Same file: added PgAdapter() layer factory
Same file: rewired defaultLayer to use Layer.suspend with Flag.OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL backend selection

completed_phases.name: Migrate Production Call Sites
files_changed: src/control-plane/workspace.ts (synced function → adapter.query, plus TODO on remaining sync callback)
src/sync/index.ts (process function → adapter.transaction with DrizzleClient param)
deferred_seams: cli/cmd/db.ts: CLI debug tool (intentional SQLite carveout)

completed_phases.name: Migrate Test Call Sites
files_changed: 13 test files (all Database.use calls removed, proven by grep)
test/fixture/db.ts (Postgres-aware resetDatabase: skips file deletion when OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL set)

remaining_phases.name: Generate Initial Postgres DDL
remaining_phases.description: Run drizzle-kit generate against drizzle.config.pg.ts. Requires bun install + drizzle-kit available.
remaining_phases.blocking_defects: Packages declared in package.json but not yet installed. Needs bun install.

remaining_phases.name: SQLite-to-Postgres Data Migration
remaining_phases.description: Create migrate-to-pg.ts CLI command. Reads SQLite via Database import, writes to Postgres via PGlite/pg client.
remaining_phases.blocking_defects: Phase 1.4 must be complete (Postgres schema must exist)

remaining_phases.name: Resolve Deferred Seams
remaining_phases.description: Rewrite projectors.ts and fence.ts to use DatabaseAdapter.Service. Document cli/cmd/db.ts as SQLite-only.

remaining_phases.name: SQLite Deprecation & Cleanup
remaining_phases.description: Remove SQLite-specific files, route #db to db.pg.ts, make Postgres default.

remaining_phases.name: Profile Parity
remaining_phases.description: Encode wave model, review gates, and approval artifacts in source prompts. Proceeds in parallel with Track 1.
remaining_phases.blocking_defects: Target file paths need executor verification (src/agent/ directory)

remaining_phases.name: DuckDB Analytical Sidecar
remaining_phases.description: DuckDB for analytical synthesis. Deferred to separate milestone.

next_convergent_course: 1. Run 'bun install' in packages/opencode/ to materialize Postgres driver dependencies
2. Run 'bun run db generate --config drizzle.config.pg.ts' to generate initial Postgres DDL
4. Resolve deferred seams (Phase 1.7b): projectors.ts, fence.ts, workspace.ts:985
5. Clean up SQLite and make Postgres the default backend (Phase 1.8)
6. Execute Track 2 (Profile Parity) in parallel with remaining Track 1 phases
7. Complete ~44 remaining yield* additions in workspace.test.ts helper function call sites
8. Run full test suite against Postgres backend to validate migration
